leadText: Last Respects (Japanese: おはかまいり Visit to the Grave) is a damage-dealing Ghost-type move introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] This move effect may be in need of research. Reason: Do allies fainting in multi-battles or Tera raid battles add to the power? You can discuss this on the talk page. Last Respects inflicts damage. Its base power, which starts at 50, is increased by an additional 50 each time a Pokémon on the user's side faints during a battle. Revived Pokémon who then faint again also count, with the base power capping at 5,050 after Pokémon faint 100 times in the same battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V ZA The user attacks to avenge its allies. The more defeated allies there are in the user's party, the greater the move's power.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Last Respects can reach the highest base power of all moves , capping at 5,050. It is the only move whose base power can be more than 3 digits long.
